protein_name: Odorant receptor. Belongs to the G-protein coupled receptor 1 family. Highly expressed in prostate. Very low levels may be detected in some other tissues, such as placenta, skeletal muscle, heart, ovary and testis. Up-regulated in prostate cancers. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
